rebrand_transform: case-preserving hermes->kopi; plus post-pass hermes-agent/kopi-agent -> kopi-ai-agent (package/repo name)
merge_method: TWO scenarios, do not confuse them. (A) INCREMENTAL SYNC — the normal case, used for v5..v8: per-file delta 3-way. base = the PREVIOUS synced_to_commit, theirs = new hermes HEAD, ours = current kopi tip. For each file in `git diff --name-status -M base theirs`, transform path+content (case-preserving hermes->kopi + hermes-agent/kopi-agent->kopi-ai-agent), then `git merge-file` into kopi's worktree. Tooling: scratchpad `batch_merge.py <hermes> <kopi> <base> <theirs>`; split large ranges into contiguous batches and merge/compile/test each. Because the delta contains ONLY real upstream changes, there is NO silent-drop risk. (B) FROM-SCRATCH RE-FORK — rare, only if you ever re-materialize the whole tree: base MUST be c1b46d9 (kopi's TRUE initial rebranded commit, the real common ancestor), NOT a synthetic T(fork) — a too-new base silently drops upstream code as 'ours deleted it'. c1b46d9 applies ONLY to scenario B; never use it as the base for an incremental delta.
conflict_policy: website/** + i18n kept KOPI's (user maintains these); README.md/install.sh kept KOPI's; .env.example kept KOPI PROXY block + upstream providers; version fields kept KOPI's (see rules); lockfiles + model-catalog.json regenerated, never taken from upstream. KOPI-CUSTOM features that upstream ALSO touches -> UNION-merge (keep the kopi addition AND apply the upstream change), never a blind take-upstream: e.g. inventory.py ConfigContext.current_api_key (kopi) + excluded_providers (upstream); web_server.py office/subagent block (kopi-only, upstream lacks _read_office_agents) + ssh endpoint/selftest cancel (upstream); main.ts `import type * as ElectronNS` namespace pattern (kopi) vs upstream's named electron imports (keep ours; the namespace covers new symbols like powerSaveBlocker). Everything with no kopi divergence -> take upstream transformed.
post_merge_checks: restore kopi-own files the 3-way deletes (base has them, upstream doesn't): compare merge deletions vs upstream's real deletions
kopi-agent -> kopi-ai-agent naming pass (skip skills/** and -memory/-setup/-dev/-skill-authoring suffixes)
integrity scan: non-customized files should match T(upstream) modulo brand
rebrand must NOT touch real npm registry package names (hermes-parser, hermes-estree, ...) in package-lock.json / package.json deps — they 404 on npm if renamed
green_ci_runbook: Run these AFTER every merge, BEFORE pushing, so CI passes on the first try (each item is a real failure we hit and fixed; skipping one turns main red). Order matters. 1) LOCKFILES: `uv lock` (pyproject version/deps changed -> uv lock --check is a blocking CI gate and every test slice dies on uv sync --locked) AND `npm install` at repo root (any package.json dep change -> npm ci fails EUSAGE 'Missing X from lock file'; the @playwright/test devDep bit us). 2) VERSION SOURCES: run `scripts/bump-version.sh` (no args) to VERIFY all 4 sources agree (package.json, apps/desktop/package.json, pyproject.toml, kopi_cli/__init__.py); the script also re-locks uv.lock. NOTE: acp_registry/agent.json + tests/acp/test_registry_manifest.py were REMOVED in v9 following upstream #68217 (ACP registry ripped out with brew/PyPI); bump-version.sh's write_agent_json is a no-op guard now (skips if absent). 3) BRAND/ORG: `grep -rn 'NousResearch/hermes-agent\|hermes-agent.git' --include='*.py' --include='*.sh' --include='*.ts' --include='*.ps1'` must be empty (source install/update paths must point at kopiagent/kopi-ai-agent, not upstream). 4) STALE INSTALL TESTS: the 13 tests/test_install_sh_*.py + test_install_{diverged_update,lockfile_churn,no_initial_commit,unmerged_index,autostash_conflict_recovery} modules assert the OLD upstream linear installer and MUST stay `pytestmark = skip` (KOPI uses the staged Hermes installer; coverage is tests/test_install_sh_kopi.py). A sync that un-skips them turns CI red. 5) LINT: `npm run fix` at root (eslint --fix + prettier); the js-autofix workflow pushes fixes straight to main now (no AUTOFIX_BOT_PAT), but landing them yourself keeps CI green immediately.
known_noise_failures: These fail LOCALLY on macOS but are NOT regressions and pass on Linux CI (or are optional-dep gaps) — do NOT chase them after a sync: tests/acp/test_edit_approval, tests/tools/test_file_tools*, test_line_ending_preservation, test_cross_profile_guard, test_file_staleness, test_base_environment (macOS /private path + FS semantics); tests/kopi_cli/test_runtime_provider_resolution qwen-oauth token asserts (upstream mock drift); test_voice_mode/test_browser_camofox/test_web_tools_tavily/test_computer_use (optional deps / network). Baseline: ~30 files / ~94 tests fail locally with `scripts/run_tests_parallel.py` on a clean tree. Only investigate NEW files beyond this set. Desktop vitest: 2 flaky UI tests (toolset-config-panel, use-prompt-actions) fail only under parallel load — rerun the file in isolation to confirm before treating as real.

notes: The `synced_to_commit` field above is the single source of truth for the last upstream HEAD pulled — read it, do not rely on any hash hardcoded in prose. For the NEXT sync use merge_method scenario A (incremental delta): base = current `synced_to_commit`, theirs = new hermes HEAD. After merging, run green_ci_runbook (above) before pushing, then bump `synced_to_commit` + `sync_tag` + `synced_date`, append a `history` line, and create the new hermes-sync-<hash> tag on the marker commit.
rules: version fields are OURS: pyproject.toml version, kopi_cli/__init__.py __version__, package.json + apps/desktop/package.json version follow the KOPI product version (scripts/bump-version.sh) — never take upstream version bumps

lockfiles are DERIVED, never hand-edited and never taken from upstream blindly: after any version or dependency change run `uv lock` (Python) and `npm install` (JS); both --check/ci gates block CI. bump-version.sh re-locks uv.lock automatically (agent.json removed in v9 per upstream #68217).

install/update paths stay on OUR repo+domain: kopiagent/kopi-ai-agent and kopiaiagent.com. A sync that reintroduces NousResearch/hermes-agent or hermes.nousresearch.com in scripts/*, kopi_cli/*, apps/desktop/electron/* must be reverted to the kopi values (see green_ci_runbook step 3).

install.sh is the staged Hermes protocol rebranded + one kopi injection (provision_kopi_proxy_key in the config stage). If a sync rewrites it, re-apply the case-preserving rebrand + re-inject provisioning; keep the 13 upstream test_install_sh_* modules skipped.
each hermes-sync-<hash> tag points at that sync's 'bump marker' commit; tags are local-only unless pushed (git push origin --tags).
